assertionResults.observation: Public issue #31 records PR #41 exact head 546c89780d9396df6dae3b28173b7fe98e0515f4 with SDK 32/32, receipt, attestation, and journal checks plus browser-to-Anvil 4/4; PR #50 run 29184758002 provides later all-green cumulative validation. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: The immutable review names the position recipient and refund target and binds both to calldata.

Public issue #31 records PR #41 exact head 546c89780d9396df6dae3b28173b7fe98e0515f4 with SDK 32/32, receipt, attestation, and journal checks plus browser-to-Anvil 4/4; PR #50 run 29184758002 provides later all-green cumulative validation. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Expected net X and Y placed, protected minimum amounts, and leftover X and Y are shown separately.

Public issue #31 records PR #41 exact head 546c89780d9396df6dae3b28173b7fe98e0515f4 with SDK 32/32, receipt, attestation, and journal checks plus browser-to-Anvil 4/4; PR #50 run 29184758002 provides later all-green cumulative validation. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Residual assets are identified by actual token identity and are not hidden as slippage, fees, or gas.

Public issue #31 records PR #41 exact head 546c89780d9396df6dae3b28173b7fe98e0515f4 with SDK 32/32, receipt, attestation, and journal checks plus browser-to-Anvil 4/4; PR #50 run 29184758002 provides later all-green cumulative validation. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: A changed recipient, refund target, minimum, or residual estimate invalidates the prior review.
